Pick_User.Exclude_keyofUser.password__.description: From T, pick a set of properties whose keys are in the union K

Omit_User.password_.description: Construct a type with the properties of T except for those in type K.

post.description:
Upload nhiều files cùng lúc.
Trả array theo đúng thứ tự upload.
Caller tự map url vào field tương ứng.
